description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and foregrip, giving it a traditional appearance. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with visible mechanical details such as a detachable box magazine and a prominent charging handle. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The muzzle is fitted with a flash hider, and the rifle is equipped with a brown leather sling for easier carrying. The overall finish combines matte wood grain with smooth, dark metal surfaces, and there are small metallic accents and fasteners visible along the body. The rifle's proportions and features indicate it is designed for practical use in urban environments.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal receiver and barrel, detachable box magazine, compact optic, and a flash hider, finished with a brown leather sling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metal receiver, detachable box magazine, mounted optic, and flash hider, with the leather sling hanging below.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle with flash hider, the alignment of the optic, and the top of the magazine protruding to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, magazine, optic, and flash hider, with the sling visible below.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, the top of the receiver, and the alignment of the optic and magazine.
